---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for AMOS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Brief description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
How should this work? Include any technical details or references.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Domain
Which part of AMOS does this affect?
- [ ] Core (data model, adapters, security)
- [ ] Services (autonomy, AI, sensor fusion)
- [ ] Integrations (PX4, TAK, ROS 2, MQTT, DDS)
- [ ] Simulator (scenarios, sim engine)
- [ ] Plugins (SDK, adapters)
- [ ] Web UI (templates, API routes)
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or references.
